title: Enchanting Tree
description: An overhaul to the vanilla enchantment system, adding a brand new skill-tree inspired system.
body:
Enchanting Tree features a brand new enchantment system, inspired by skill-tree systems in rpgs. You will never need to craft 100x the same item to get the enchantments you want, now you just need to "buy" the previous levels of the enchantment you want !
Levels cost are calculated based on the anvil cost of the enchantments, so this mod should work with most modded enchantments. 
Also makes the enchanting table store items, which means you can leave the enchanting table and the items will stay in it.

![Here a quick showcase of the enchanting tree: you can see that you have parts that are locked, because you need more xp/lapis or a higher level enchanting table, some part are already enchanted, and some part can be unlocked](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40ebea1a097d000ad03f919589c01bfb981a2ba0.png)
